name: Rage Of Towers
short_description: Rage of Towers delivers a unique hybrid experience where tower defense meets real-time control. Build and upgrade your towers and directly control turrets and mobile units to respond quickly to evolving enemy threats and turn the tide of battle
detailed_description:
In Rage of Towers, tower defense meets real-time action. You’ll defend your base from massive waves of enemies using classic tower defense strategy — but this time, you’re not just watching from above. Step into the battlefield and take control.

🧠 THINK FAST. ACT FASTER.

In most tower defense games, you build and watch. In Rage of Towers, the battlefield is dynamic and reactive — towers aren’t just static weapons, and enemies won’t wait patiently in line. You’ll need to adapt in real time, taking control of special towers and mobile units, redirecting fire, and executing clutch defenses to survive.

🎮 FEATURES

🛠️ BUILD POWERFUL TOWERS

  • Choose from a wide arsenal of towers including:

    • Machine Guns, Artillery, Tesla, Missile Launchers, Air Strike Tower and more.

  • Chain tower effects together — slow + AOE, shock + burn, Drones + Tanks — to devastate incoming waves.

⚙️ CONTROL THE BATTLEFIELD

  • Take direct control of mobile defense units such as drones And Tanks.

  • Manually operate certain high-impact towers for tactical moments (e.g., aim artillery, trigger Rockets).

  • Reposition your mobile units in real time to react to Everything.

FACE EVOLVING ENEMIES

  • Waves include a wide variety of enemies:

  • Tanks, Shielded Units, Air Units, and more.

  • Each enemy type has unique strengths, Abilities, and movement behaviors.

  • Later stages introduce adaptive AI behavior, forcing you to constantly rethink your defense.

🌍 MULTIPLE MAPS & ENVIRONMENTS

  • Defend in stunning, Realistic maps: 45 Stages With 45 unique Atmospheres .

  • Each map has unique layouts, terrain advantages, and environmental challenges.

🎯 STRATEGY + SKILL

  • Success is about more than tower spam:

    • Smart positioning.

    • Real-time resource use.

    • Timing manual abilities.

    • Responding to unexpected threats.

🔓 PROGRESSION SYSTEM

  • Unlock new towers, upgrades, and mobile units.

  • Experiment with different tower/unit synergies to master difficult levels.

🌀 GAME MODES

  • Campaign Mode: Complete handcrafted levels with varied objectives and increasing complexity.

  • Endless Mode: Survive as long as possible against increasingly difficult waves.

🎯 WHY RAGE OF TOWERS?

If you love the planning and payoff of tower defense, but crave more control, more action, and more depth, Rage of Towers is for you. It rewards quick thinking, strategic foresight, and clutch decision-making — all in one tightly designed package.

🧨 KEY FEATURES SUMMARY

✅ Hybrid of tower defense and real-time tactical control
✅ Direct tower/unit micromanagement
✅ Dozens of towers and upgrades
✅ Unique enemy waves
✅ Multiple maps and enemy types
✅ Long Campaign, Endless
✅ Realistic visuals and dynamic battlefields

With a wide selection of towers to place and upgrade and an array of complex strategic maps to test your defenses, even the most skilled Tower Defense players will meet a challenge in Rage Of towers.

Gameplay note

Developer's Recommended Configuration is expected to fully work from the start to the end. This includes all movements, menu, and key functions mapped to the controller.
